mapper.select: select '学生总数' as title, count(*) as value, '人' as unit from campus_student where status = '0' union all select '教师总数' as title, count(*) as value, '人' as unit from campus_teacher where status = '0' union all select '当前课程' as title, count(distinct s.course_id) as value, '门' as unit from campus_course_section s inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id where term.current_flag = 'Y' union all select '考试安排' as title, count(*) as value, '场' as unit from campus_exam
select course_type as name, count(*) as value from campus_course where status = '0' group by course_type order by value desc
select college_name as name, count(*) as value from campus_student where status = '0' group by college_name order by value desc

select term.term_name as name, round(avg(score.score), 2) as value from campus_score score inner join campus_course_section s on s.section_id = score.section_id inner join campus_term term on term.term_id = s.term_id group by term.term_id, term.term_name, term.start_date order by term.start_date

select '待审批申请' as title, count(*) as value, '条' as unit from campus_application where status = '1' union all select '待审批资产' as title, count(*) as value, '条' as unit from campus_asset_borrow where status = '1' union all select '待缴金额' as title, coalesce(round(sum(amount), 2), 0) as value, '元' as unit from campus_payment_item where status = 'unpaid' union all select '今日一卡通交易' as title, count(*) as value, '笔' as unit from campus_card_transaction where date(transaction_time) = curdate()

select 'OA待审批' as name, count(*) as value from campus_application where status = '1' union all select '资产待审批' as name, count(*) as value from campus_asset_borrow where status = '1' union all select 'OA已通过' as name, count(*) as value from campus_application where status = '2' union all select '资产已通过' as name, count(*) as value from campus_asset_borrow where status = '2'

select '待缴项目' as name, count(*) as value from campus_payment_item where status = 'unpaid' union all select '已缴项目' as name, count(*) as value from campus_payment_item where status = 'paid' union all select '已缴金额' as name, coalesce(round(sum(amount), 2), 0) as value from campus_payment_record where status = 'paid'

select case transaction_type when 'recharge' then '充值' when 'consume' then '消费' when 'refund' then '退款' else transaction_type end as name, count(*) as value from campus_card_transaction group by transaction_type order by value desc

select '资产总数' as name, coalesce(sum(total_quantity), 0) as value from campus_asset where status = '0' union all select '可借数量' as name, coalesce(sum(available_quantity), 0) as value from campus_asset where status = '0' union all select '借出数量' as name, coalesce(sum(total_quantity - available_quantity), 0) as value from campus_asset where status = '0'
